notes: World Cup R16: resolved 6 tentative NRK/TV2 labels from the official NTB press release + NRK programside — Brasil–Norge NRK, Mexico–England TV2, Portugal–Spania TV2, USA–Belgia NRK, Argentina–Egypt TV2, Sveits–Colombia NRK.

World Cup quarterfinals: NRK programside explicitly assigns the July 11 Miami QF to TV 2 — resolved that one. The other three QF splits (Jul 9 Boston Morocco–France, Jul 10 LA, Jul 12 Kansas City) are not yet published, so their NRK/TV2 labels were left tentative (an honest guess beats a wrong certainty).

Sjakk-NM 2026 (Landsturneringen): streaming was wrongly listed as NRK — the tournament is shown live on Direktesport (+ Lichess relay), confirmed by sjakknm2026.no and the bergensjakk day-1 report. Corrected to Direktesport.

Wimbledon finals: both were wrongly listed as TV 2 Play. Norway rights are HBO Max/Eurosport with the singles finals free-to-air on REX (official WBD press release). Corrected both women's and men's final to HBO Max/REX. (The prior run's log already flagged the REX finding but the field had reverted to TV 2 Play.)

Tour de France stages 6–9: route, dates and stage types confirmed via Wikipedia; streaming (TV 2 Play) correct. Exact ASO start times are still unpublished, so the estimated times were retained and each stage marked confirmed.
No events removed — every checked event demonstrably exists.
